value.name: Space Mission Tracking Application

value.name: Design Data Model
value.description: Design the data model for missions, crew, and launch windows.

value.description: Scaffold the application structure and core modules.

value.name: Implement Mission Views
value.description: Implement mission listing and detail views.

value.description: Validate the implementation with the operator and generate documentation.
value.goal: Validate the implementation with the operator and generate documentation.

value.title: Define the crew entity with id, name, and role.

value.name: Create Project Layout
value.title: Create the project layout and entry points.
